# Packages Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-packages
kind: Packages
spec:
  action: install
  packages: [kubelet]
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Packages
spec:
  action: install
  packages: [kubelet, kubeadm, kubectl]
```
